title: About Lee | Lee Dillon MP
meta_description: Lee Dillon is the Liberal Democrat MP for Newbury. Find out more about his background, experience, and dedication to serving the community and delivering positive change.
headings: h3: In addition to legislative responsibilities, Lee Dillon actively engages with local organisations and individuals to understand their needs and collaborates on initiatives that aim to enhance the overall well-being of the Newbury community.
text_excerpt: --> About Lee | Lee Dillon MP top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. About Lee Lee Dillon was elected as the MP for Newbury in July 2024, following a long-standing commitment to serving his community. A lifelong resident of Thatcham, where his family runs a local pub, Lee went to school in both Thatcham and Newbury. His deep roots in the area fuel his passion for making a positive impact locally. ​ Lee began his political journey in 2007, when he was first elected to the local council. Over the years, he has taken on multiple leadership roles, culminating in becoming Council Leader in May 2023, after the Liberal Democrats took control. His work has always focused on improving local services, infrastructure, and opportunities for the people he represents. ​ Inspired by the late Liberal Democrat MP for Newbury, David Rendel, Lee brings a similar drive and dedication to his role. Prior to becoming an MP, he worked for a not-for-profit housing association, where he helped provide homes to those in need. His priorities as MP include addressing the cost-of-living crisis, supporting families, and ensuring fair access to services. Lee has been a vocal advocate for free school meal support during holidays and fought to save the local ReadiBus service from Conservative cuts. ​ Outside of politics, Lee is a passionate sports fan. He regularly takes his young children to watch Reading Football Club and counts watching his hometown team, Thatcham Town, win at Wembley in the 2018 FA Vase Final as one of his favourite sporting moments. ​ Lee is committed to representing the people of Newbury with energy and focus, always aiming to improve lives and opportunities for all. Member of Parliament, Newbury July 2024 - Present Lee Dillon is the voice of Newbury in the House of Commons, working tirelessly to address key issues and contribute to the development of effective policies for the betterment of the constituency. Community Engagement Local Initiatives and Advocacy In addition to legislative responsibilities, Lee Dillon actively engages with local organisations and individuals to understand their needs and collaborates on initiatives that aim to enhance the overall well-being of the Newbury community. lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP.
